dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Edward follows the directions on the poster, weaving through the quiet, older district of town. His steps are tired, but there’s purpose in them.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Being the eldest means there’s no room for hesitation. His siblings count on him. His mother fights every day to support them. He refuses to make her struggle alone.

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: If I can get this job… it’ll take some weight off Mom’s shoulders.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [He opens the café door. Melodic chimes greet him, warm and strangely soothing.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Welcome! A determined aura walks in—hm, fascinating!

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: I’m here about the job posting. I… really need the opportunity.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Need? A powerful word. What drives that need, I wonder?

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: My family. My mom works nonstop, and my younger siblings need support. I’m the eldest—so I have to step up.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Kit studies Edward with curious, gentle eyes—not judging, just listening.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Responsibility, resilience, and heart. Excellent traits for someone joining the Wish House.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Come, Edward. Let me show you where your story here begins.
